title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The much anticipated Japanese Derby is here,
and the entire audience is focused on the
long-awaited showdown between the BNW trio.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Prior to the race, Biwa Hayahide senses
something peculiar about Winning Ticket, just
like with Narita Taishin at the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket's dream is to win the Derby. Her
focus has been so singular that she's been
isolating herself to train for it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide tries to convince herself that she
can pin down the source of that strange feeling as
she heads out to the race.
